# SOMspec - Structured Object Model Specification

SOMspec defines SOM (Structured Object Model), an open JSON format for representing web pages for AI agent consumption.

## Key resources
- Specification: https://somspec.org/spec
- Reference: https://somspec.org/reference
- GitHub: https://github.com/nicholasgriffintn/som-spec
- Reference implementation: https://plasmate.app

## About SOM
SOM replaces raw HTML as the format AI agents use to understand web pages.
- 17x fewer tokens than raw HTML on average
- Typed element roles (link, button, heading, input, etc.)
- Stable SHA-256 element IDs across fetches
- Semantic region detection (main, nav, aside, footer)
- Publisher-servable as alternate representation
